Software Engineer: Design, develop, and maintain scalable software applications. Strong knowledge of data structures, algorithms, and system design required. Experience with Python/Java/C++ preferred.
Frontend Developer: Build responsive and interactive web interfaces using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and frameworks like React or Angular. Focus on UI/UX and performance optimization.
Backend Developer: Develop server-side logic, APIs, and database systems. Experience with Flask, Django, Node.js, REST APIs, and SQL/NoSQL databases.
Full Stack Developer: Work on both frontend and backend systems. Must be skilled in MERN/MEAN stack or similar technologies. Handle end-to-end application development.
Data Scientist: Analyze large datasets to extract insights. Strong knowledge of Python, machine learning, statistics, and data visualization tools like Pandas and Matplotlib.
Machine Learning Engineer: Design and deploy ML models. Knowledge of supervised/unsupervised learning, deep learning, TensorFlow/PyTorch, and model optimization.
AI Engineer: Develop AI-powered applications using NLP, computer vision, and generative models. Experience with LLMs and APIs is preferred.
DevOps Engineer: Manage CI/CD pipelines, cloud infrastructure, and deployment automation. Experience with Docker, Kubernetes, AWS, and Linux systems.
Cloud Engineer: Design and maintain cloud infrastructure on AWS/Azure/GCP. Focus on scalability, security, and cost optimization.
Cybersecurity Analyst: Protect systems from cyber threats. Knowledge of network security, encryption, ethical hacking, and vulnerability assessment.
Database Administrator: Manage and optimize databases. Expertise in SQL, indexing, performance tuning, backup, and recovery strategies.
Mobile App Developer: Develop Android/iOS applications using Flutter, React Native, or native technologies like Kotlin and Swift.
UI/UX Designer: Design user-friendly interfaces and experiences. Strong skills in wireframing, prototyping, Figma, and design systems.
Product Manager: Define product vision, roadmap, and features. Coordinate between technical and business teams to deliver software products.
Business Analyst: Analyze business requirements and translate them into technical solutions. Strong communication and documentation skills required.
System Engineer: Maintain and troubleshoot IT systems, servers, and infrastructure. Ensure reliability and performance of systems.
Network Engineer: Design and manage computer networks, routing, switching, and network security protocols.
AI Researcher: Conduct advanced research in artificial intelligence, deep learning, and NLP. Focus on innovation and experimentation.
QA Engineer: Test software applications for bugs and performance issues. Knowledge of manual and automated testing tools required.
Software Tester: Execute test cases, report bugs, and ensure software quality before deployment.
